description_long: This is a tall, elegant bottle with a slender, tapering body and a rounded, wooden-looking cap. The bottle features a gradient coloration, transitioning from a dark gray at the top to a warm amber at the base, with intricate gold decorative patterns and text on the front. The lower portion of the bottle is adorned with ornate gold designs, giving it a luxurious and premium appearance. The neck of the bottle is elongated and features a series of subtle ridges, adding to its refined silhouette. The cap appears to be made of wood or a wood-like material, contrasting with the glass body. The overall design suggests it is a high-end beverage bottle, possibly for a premium spirit or liquor.
description: A tall, slender bottle with a gradient gray-to-amber body, ornate gold decorations, and a rounded wooden cap. The front features intricate gold text and patterns, giving it a luxurious appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing ornate gold text and decorative patterns on the bottle's body, with the wooden cap clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view with no visible text, only the gradient color and gold decorative elements at the base are prominent.
description_view_2: Front view similar to view 0, displaying the gold text and ornate designs, with the cap and neck details visible.
description_view_3: Rear angled view, highlighting the bottle's gradient color and gold base decoration, with no visible text.
attribute_label_or_branding: Gold text and logo on the front, with decorative gold patterns at the base; branding is prominent and ornate.
